key.name: ambient-enabled
key.description: Whether the ambient light sensor is enabled

key.name: sleep-inactive-ac-timeout
key.description: The timeout in seconds before the system goes to sleep on AC power

key.name: sleep-inactive-battery-timeout
key.description: The timeout in seconds before the system goes to sleep on battery

key.name: sleep-inactive-ac-type
key.description: What to do when the system idles on AC power

key.name: sleep-inactive-battery-type
key.description: What to do when the system idles on battery power

key.name: idle-dim
key.description: Whether to dim the screen when idle

key.name: power-button-action
key.description: What to do when the power button is pressed

key.name: power-saver-profile-on-low-battery
key.description: Switch to power saver mode on low battery
